MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-14-2005 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES: EDWARD SINGER FOR PLAINTIFF TROPHY PROPERTIES
LIMITED SCOPE REPRESENTATION BY PAUL BEHREND FOR DEFENDANT MEGAN KRAUSE

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD. CASE SETTLED. TRIAL DATE OFF CALENDAR. TERMS OF SETTLEMENT PLACED ON RECORD AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT TO VACATE AND SURRENDER POSSESSION OF 1656 LEAVENWORTH #5, ON OR BEFORE 4PM, 8/31/05. PLAINTIFF TO PAY DEFENDANT $5000 AND WAIVE ALL BACKRENT AND LATE FEES AND RENT. DEPOSIT OF $200 TO BE RETURNED TO DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY WILL SIGN LETTER OF RECOMMENDATION PROVIDED BY DEFENDANT.
IF DEFENDANT DOES NOT COMPLY WITH TERMS, PLAINTIFF MAY FILE AN EXPARTE APPLICATION, WITH 48 HOUR NOTICE TO DEFENDANT, FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FOR IMMEDIATE POSSESSION, FORFEITURE OF LEASE, $2830 AND $23.33 PER DAY. ALL PARTIES AGREE TO TERMS.

JUDGE PRO TEM:JOE CARIGNAN; CLERK:BARBARA MORRIS;REPORTER: CARL SAUCEDA (218)
